name: Cash Management Pool
description: Maple's Cash Management Pool is an onchain cash-management product for accredited investors. It accepts USDC deposits and targets yield sourced from U.S. Treasury bills and Treasury-bill-collateralized reverse repurchase agreements through Room40 Capital's standalone borrower SPV.
subcategory: Tokenized U.S. Treasury cash management pool

_meta.notes: Inception date and market label cross-checked against RWA.xyz; official product mechanics cross-checked against Maple docs.
